channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Greek minister views criticism of stricter migration policies as a 'badge of honor'
item.description: Greece's migration minister on Monday described criticism from human rights groups as a 'badge of honor' and pledged to intensify migration enforcement.

item.title: Judge grants asylum to Iranian woman adopted by U.S. veteran after deportation threats
item.description: A federal immigration judge granted asylum to a woman orphaned in Iran in the 1970s and adopted by an American war veteran, despite deportation threats.

item.title: The Thucydides Trope: China Is No Match for America
item.description: Western analysts and leaders who accept PRC propaganda misunderstand reality.

item.title: Immigration agent hit by vehicle in N.J., fires gun at fleeing suspect, police say
item.description: A federal immigration agent was struck by a vehicle Monday while trying to apprehend someone in New Jersey, police reported.
